---
ID: US-SLD-033
Title: HTML and PDF Export Service Contract
Status: Missing
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-24
---

As a slide editor user
I want reliable HTML and PDF export from current slide state
So I can deliver client-ready output without manual reconstruction

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] HTML export produces a clean file without editor chrome and with preserved component layout.
- [ ] PDF export contract is defined (client print flow and optional server-rendered fallback path).
- [ ] Export errors are surfaced with clear fallback guidance and retry options.
- [ ] Export output includes deterministic metadata needed for re-import/traceability.
